translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya jika Kami kehendaki, tentulah Kami akan hapuskan apa yang Kami telah wahyukan kepadamu, kemudian engkau tidak akan beroleh sebarang pembela terhadap Kami untuk mengembalikannya.

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّ فَضْلَهُۥ كَانَ عَلَيْكَ كَبِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Illa rahmatan min rabbika inna fadlahu kana AAalayka kabeeran

translations.en_sahih: Except [We have left it with you] as a mercy from your Lord. Indeed, His favor upon you has ever been great.
translations.en_yusufali: Except for Mercy from thy Lord: for his bounty is to thee (indeed) great.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tetapi kekalnya Al-Quran itu) hanyalah sebagai rahmat dari tuhanmu; sesungguhnya limpah kurnianya kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) amatlah besar.

ayahs.arabic: قُل لَّئِنِ ٱجْتَمَعَتِ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَأْتُوا۟ بِمِثْلِ هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانِ لَا يَأْتُونَ بِمِثْلِهِۦ وَلَوْ كَانَ بَعْضُهُمْ لِبَعْضٍ ظَهِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul laini ijtamaAAati alinsu waaljinnu AAala an yatoo bimithli hatha alqurani la yatoona bimithlihi walaw kana baAAduhum libaAAdin thaheeran

translations.en_sahih: Say, "If mankind and the jinn gathered in order to produce the like of this Qur'an, they could not produce the like of it, even if they were to each other assistants."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "If the whole of mankind and Jinns were to gather together to produce the like of this Qur'an, they could not produce the like thereof, even if they backed up each other with help and support.
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Sesungguhnya jika sekalian manusia dan jin berhimpun dengan tujuan hendak membuat dan mendatangkan sebanding dengan Al-Quran ini, mereka tidak akan dapat membuat dan mendatangkan yang sebanding dengannya, walaupun mereka bantu-membantu sesama sendiri".

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ صَرَّفْنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِى هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن كُلِّ مَثَلٍ فَأَبَىٰٓ أَكْثَرُ ٱلنَّاسِ إِلَّا كُفُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad sarrafna lilnnasi fee hatha alqurani min kulli mathalin faaba aktharu alnnasi illa kufooran

translations.en_sahih: And We have certainly diversified for the people in this Qur'an from every [kind] of example, but most of the people refused [anything] except disbelief.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have explained to man, in this Qur'an, every kind of similitude: yet the greater part of men refuse (to receive it) except with ingratitude!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah menerangkan berulang-ulang kepada manusia, di dalam Al-Quran ini, dengan berbagai-bagai contoh perbandingan (yang mendatangkan iktibar); dalam pada itu, kebanyakan manusia tidak mahu menerima selain dari kekufuran.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ تَفْجُرَ لَنَا مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ يَنۢبُوعًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo lan numina laka hatta tafjura lana mina alardi yanbooAAan

translations.en_sahih: And they say, "We will not believe you until you break open for us from the ground a spring.
translations.en_yusufali: They say: "We shall not believe in thee, until thou cause a spring to gush forth for us from the earth,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka berkata: "Kami tidak sekali-kali akan beriman kepadamu (wahai Muhammad), sehingga engkau memancarkan matair dari bumi, bagi Kami.

ayahs.arabic: أَوْ تَكُونَ لَكَ جَنَّةٌ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَعِنَبٍ فَتُفَجِّرَ ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرَ خِلَـٰلَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Aw takoona laka jannatun min nakheelin waAAinabin fatufajjira alanhara khilalaha tafjeeran

translations.en_sahih: Or [until] you have a garden of palm tress and grapes and make rivers gush forth within them in force [and abundance]
translations.en_yusufali: "Or (until) thou have a garden of date trees and vines, and cause rivers to gush forth in their midst, carrying abundant water;
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau (sehingga) engkau mempunyai kebun dari pohon-pohon tamar dan anggur, kemudian engkau mengalirkan sungai-sungai dari celah-celahnya dengan aliran yang terpancar terus-menerus.

ayahs.arabic: أَوْ تُسْقِطَ ٱلسَّمَآءَ كَمَا زَعَمْتَ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا أَوْ تَأْتِىَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ قَبِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Aw tusqita alssamaa kama zaAAamta AAalayna kisafan aw tatiya biAllahi waalmalaikati qabeelan

translations.en_sahih: Or you make the heaven fall upon us in fragments as you have claimed or you bring Allah and the angels before [us]
translations.en_yusufali: "Or thou cause the sky to fall in pieces, as thou sayest (will happen), against us; or thou bring Allah and the angels before (us) face to face:
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau (sehingga) engkau gugurkan langit berkeping-keping atas kami, sebagaimana yang engkau katakan (akan berlaku); atau (sehingga) engkau bawakan Allah dan malaikat untuk kami menyaksikannya.

ayahs.arabic: أَوْ يَكُونَ لَكَ بَيْتٌ مِّن زُخْرُفٍ أَوْ تَرْقَىٰ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَلَن نُّؤْمِنَ لِرُقِيِّكَ حَتَّىٰ تُنَزِّلَ عَلَيْنَا كِتَـٰبًا نَّقْرَؤُهُۥ ۗ قُلْ سُبْحَانَ رَبِّى هَلْ كُنتُ إِلَّا بَشَرًا رَّسُولًا
ayahs.transliteration: Aw yakoona laka baytun min zukhrufin aw tarqa fee alssamai walan numina liruqiyyika hatta tunazzila AAalayna kitaban naqraohu qul subhana rabbee hal kuntu illa basharan rasoolan

translations.en_sahih: Or you have a house of gold or you ascend into the sky. And [even then], we will not believe in your ascension until you bring down to us a book we may read." Say, "Exalted is my Lord! Was I ever but a human messenger?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Or thou have a house adorned with gold, or thou mount a ladder right into the skies. No, we shall not even believe in thy mounting until thou send down to us a book that we could read." Say: "Glory to my Lord! Am I aught but a man,- a messenger?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Atau (sehingga) engkau mempunyai sebuah rumah terhias dari emas; atau (sehingga) engkau naik ke langit; dan kami tidak sekali-kali akan percaya tentang kenaikanmu ke langit sebelum engkau turunkan kepada kami sebuah kitab yang dapat kami membacanya". Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad):" Maha Suci Tuhanku! Bukankah aku ini hanya seorang manusia yang menjadi Rasul?

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا مَنَعَ ٱلنَّاسَ أَن يُؤْمِنُوٓا۟ إِذْ جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ أَبَعَثَ ٱللَّهُ بَشَرًا رَّسُولًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wama manaAAa alnnasa an yuminoo ith jaahumu alhuda illa an qaloo abaAAatha Allahu basharan rasoolan

translations.en_sahih: And what prevented the people from believing when guidance came to them except that they said, "Has Allah sent a human messenger?"
translations.en_yusufali: What kept men back from belief when Guidance came to them, was nothing but this: they said, "Has Allah sent a man (like us) to be (His) Messenger?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiadalah yang menghalang orang-orang musyrik itu dari beriman ketika datang kepada mereka hidayah petunjuk, melainkan (keingkaran mereka tentang manusia menjadi Rasul, sehingga) mereka berkata dengan hairan: "Patutkah Allah mengutus seorang manusia menjadi Rasul?"

ayahs.arabic: قُل لَّوْ كَانَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ يَمْشُونَ مُطْمَئِنِّينَ لَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَلَكًا رَّسُولًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul law kana fee alardi malaikatun yamshoona mutmainneena lanazzalna AAalayhim mina alssamai malakan rasoolan

translations.en_sahih: Say, "If there were upon the earth angels walking securely, We would have sent down to them from the heaven an angel [as a] messenger."
translations.en_yusufali: Say, "If there were settled, on earth, angels walking about in peace and quiet, We should certainly have sent them down from the heavens an angel for a messenger."
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Kalau ada di bumi, malaikat yang berjalan serta tinggal mendiaminya, tentulah kami akan turunkan kepada mereka dari langit, malaikat yang menjadi rasul".

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ كَفَىٰ بِٱللَّهِ شَهِيدًۢا بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرًۢا بَصِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul kafa biAllahi shaheedan baynee wabaynakum innahu kana biAAibadihi khabeeran baseeran

translations.en_sahih: Say, "Sufficient is Allah as Witness between me and you. Indeed he is ever, concerning His servants, Acquainted and Seeing."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Enough is Allah for a witness between me and you: for He is well acquainted with His servants, and He sees (all things).
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah lagi: "Cukuplah Allah menjadi saksi antaraku dengan kamu; sesungguhnya adalah Ia Amat Mendalam pengetahuanNya, lagi Amat Melihat akan keadaan hamba-hambaNya".

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَهْدِ ٱللَّهُ فَهُوَ ٱلْمُهْتَدِ ۖ وَمَن يُضْلِلْ فَلَن تَجِدَ لَهُمْ أَوْلِيَآءَ مِن دُونِهِۦ ۖ وَنَحْشُرُهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ عُمْيًا وَبُكْمًا وَصُمًّا ۖ مَّأْوَىٰهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ ۖ كُلَّمَا خَبَتْ زِدْنَـٰهُمْ سَعِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waman yahdi Allahu fahuwa almuhtadi waman yudlil falan tajida lahum awliyaa min doonihi wanahshuruhum yawma alqiyamati AAala wujoohihim AAumyan wabukman wasumman mawahum jahannamu kullama khabat zidnahum saAAeeran

translations.en_sahih: And whoever Allah guides - he is the [rightly] guided; and whoever He sends astray - you will never find for them protectors besides Him, and We will gather them on the Day of Resurrection [fallen] on their faces - blind, dumb and deaf. Their refuge is Hell; every time it subsides We increase them in blazing fire.
translations.en_yusufali: It is he whom Allah guides, that is on true Guidance; but he whom He leaves astray - for such wilt thou find no protector besides Him. On the Day of Judgment We shall gather, them together, prone on their faces, blind, dumb, and deaf: their abode will be Hell: every time it shows abatement, We shall increase from them the fierceness of the Fire.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesiapa yang diberi hidayah petunjuk oleh Allah maka dia lah yang sebenar-benarnya berjaya mencapai kebahagiaan; dan sesiapa yang disesatkanNya maka engkau tidak sekali-kali akan mendapati bagi mereka, penolong-penolong yang lain daripadaNya. Dan Kami akan himpunkan mereka pada hari kiamat (dengan menyeret mereka masing-masing) atas mukanya, dalam keadaan buta, bisu dan pekak; tempat kediaman mereka: neraka Jahannam; tiap-tiap kali malap julangan apinya, Kami tambahi mereka dengan api yang menjulang-julang.

ayahs.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآؤُهُم بِأَنَّهُمْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَقَالُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمًا وَرُفَـٰتًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ خَلْقًا جَدِيدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Thalika jazaohum biannahum kafaroo biayatina waqaloo aitha kunna AAithaman warufatan ainna lamabAAoothoona khalqan jadeedan

translations.en_sahih: That is their recompense because they disbelieved in Our verses and said, "When we are bones and crumbled particles, will we [truly] be resurrected [in] a new creation?"
translations.en_yusufali: That is their recompense, because they rejected Our signs, and said, "When we are reduced to bones and broken dust, should we really be raised up (to be) a new Creation?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Balasan mereka yang sedemikian, ialah kerana mereka kufur ingkarkan ayat-ayat Kami, dan mereka berkata: "Adakah sesudah Kami menjadi tulang dan benda yang reput, adakah Kami akan dibangkitkan semula dalam kejadian yang baharu?"

ayahs.arabic: ۞ أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ قَادِرٌ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَهُمْ أَجَلًا لَّا رَيْبَ فِيهِ فَأَبَى ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ إِلَّا كُفُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Awalam yaraw anna Allaha allathee khalaqa alssamawati waalarda qadirun AAala an yakhluqa mithlahum wajaAAala lahum ajalan la rayba feehi faaba alththalimoona illa kufooran

translations.en_sahih: Do they not see that Allah, who created the heavens and earth, is [the one] Able to create the likes of them? And He has appointed for them a term, about which there is no doubt. But the wrongdoers refuse [anything] except disbelief.
translations.en_yusufali: See they not that Allah, Who created the heavens and the earth, has power to create the like of them (anew)? Only He has decreed a term appointed, of which there is no doubt. But the unjust refuse (to receive it) except with ingratitude.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah mereka mahu memikirkan dan meyakini bahawa Allah yang menciptakan langit dan bumi, berkuasa menciptakan orang orang yang seperti mereka (dalam bentuk yang baharu), padahal Ia telahpun menentukan bagi mereka tempoh yang tidak ada syak padanya.? Dalam pada itu, orang orang yang zalim enggan menerima melainkan kekufuran.

ayahs.arabic: قُل لَّوْ أَنتُمْ تَمْلِكُونَ خَزَآئِنَ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّىٓ إِذًا لَّأَمْسَكْتُمْ خَشْيَةَ ٱلْإِنفَاقِ ۚ وَكَانَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ قَتُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul law antum tamlikoona khazaina rahmati rabbee ithan laamsaktum khashyata alinfaqi wakana alinsanu qatooran

translations.en_sahih: Say [to them], "If you possessed the depositories of the mercy of my Lord, then you would withhold out of fear of spending." And ever has man been stingy.
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "If ye had control of the Treasures of the Mercy of my Lord, behold, ye would keep them back, for fear of spending them: for man is (every) niggardly!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai muhammad): "jika kamu memiliki perbendaharaan rahmat Tuhanku pada ketika itu tentulah kamu akan berlaku bakhil kedekut kerana takut kehabisan; dan sememangnya manusia itu bertabiat bakhil kedekut".

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ تِسْعَ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ ۖ فَسْـَٔلْ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ إِذْ جَآءَهُمْ فَقَالَ لَهُۥ فِرْعَوْنُ إِنِّى لَأَظُنُّكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ مَسْحُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad atayna moosa tisAAa ayatin bayyinatin faisal banee israeela ith jaahum faqala lahu firAAawnu innee laathunnuka ya moosa mashooran

translations.en_sahih: And We had certainly given Moses nine evident signs, so ask the Children of Israel [about] when he came to them and Pharaoh said to him, "Indeed I think, O Moses, that you are affected by magic."
translations.en_yusufali: To Moses We did give Nine Clear Signs: As the Children of Israel: when he came to them, Pharaoh said to him: "O Moses! I consider thee, indeed, to have been worked upon by sorcery!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Kami telah memberi kepada Nabi Musa sembilan mukjizat yang jelas nyata (membuktikan kebenarannya); maka bertanyalah (wahai Muhammad) kepada Bani Israil (tentang itu): Ketika Nabi Musa datang kepada Firaun dan kaumnya (serta menunjukkan mukjizatnya), lalu berkatalah Firaun kepadanya: "Sesungguhnya aku fikir, engkau ini wahai Musa, seorang yang terkena sihir"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَآ أَنزَلَ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ بَصَآئِرَ وَإِنِّى لَأَظُنُّكَ يَـٰفِرْعَوْنُ مَثْبُورًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala laqad AAalimta ma anzala haolai illa rabbu alssamawati waalardi basaira wainnee laathunnuka ya firAAawnu mathbooran

translations.en_sahih: [Moses] said, "You have already known that none has sent down these [signs] except the Lord of the heavens and the earth as evidence, and indeed I think, O Pharaoh, that you are destroyed."
translations.en_yusufali: Moses said, "Thou knowest well that these things have been sent down by none but the Lord of the heavens and the earth as eye-opening evidence: and I consider thee indeed, O Pharaoh, to be one doomed to destruction!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Musa menjawab: "Sebenarnya engkau (hai Firaun) telah pun mengetahui: tiadalah yang menurunkan mukjizat-mukjizat ini melainkan Tuhan yang mencipta dan mentadbirkan langit dan bumi, sebagai bukti-bukti yang menerangkan kebenaran; dan sebenarnya aku fikir, engkau hai Firaun, akan binasa".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَرَادَ أَن يَسْتَفِزَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ فَأَغْرَقْنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ جَمِيعًا
ayahs.transliteration: Faarada an yastafizzahum mina alardi faaghraqnahu waman maAAahu jameeAAan

translations.en_sahih: So he intended to drive them from the land, but We drowned him and those with him all together.
translations.en_yusufali: So he resolved to remove them from the face of the earth: but We did drown him and all who were with him.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Firaun pun berkira hendak mengusir mereka dari bumi (Mesir) lalu Kami tenggelamkan dia bersama-sama pengikut-pengikutnya seluruhnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُلْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ لِبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ ٱسْكُنُوا۟ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا جَآءَ وَعْدُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ جِئْنَا بِكُمْ لَفِيفًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqulna min baAAdihi libanee israeela oskunoo alarda faitha jaa waAAdu alakhirati jina bikum lafeefan

translations.en_sahih: And We said after Pharaoh to the Children of Israel, "Dwell in the land, and when there comes the promise of the Hereafter, We will bring you forth in [one] gathering."
translations.en_yusufali: And We said thereafter to the Children of Israel, "Dwell securely in the land (of promise)": but when the second of the warnings came to pass, We gathered you together in a mingled crowd.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami katakan kepada Bani Israil, sesudah Firaun (dibinasakan): "Tinggalah kamu di negeri itu kemudian apabila datang tempoh hari akhirat, Kami datangkan kamu (ke Padang Mahsyar) dengan bercampur-aduk.

ayahs.arabic: وَبِٱلْحَقِّ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ وَبِٱلْحَقِّ نَزَلَ ۗ وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ إِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wabialhaqqi anzalnahu wabialhaqqi nazala wama arsalnaka illa mubashshiran wanatheeran

translations.en_sahih: And with the truth We have sent the Qur'an down, and with the truth it has descended. And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner.
translations.en_yusufali: We sent down the (Qur'an) in Truth, and in Truth has it descended: and We sent thee but to give Glad Tidings and to warn (sinners).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan dengan cara yang sungguh layak serta berhikmat Kami turunkan Al-Quran, dan dengan meliputi segala kebenaran ia diturunkan; dan tiadalah Kami mengutusmu (wahai Muhammad) melainkan sebagai pembawa berita gembira (bagi orang-orang yang beriman) dan pembawa amaran (kepada orang-orang yang ingkar).

ayahs.arabic: وَقُرْءَانًا فَرَقْنَـٰهُ لِتَقْرَأَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ عَلَىٰ مُكْثٍ وَنَزَّلْنَـٰهُ تَنزِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waquranan faraqnahu litaqraahu AAala alnnasi AAala mukthin wanazzalnahu tanzeelan

translations.en_sahih: And [it is] a Qur'an which We have separated [by intervals] that you might recite it to the people over a prolonged period. And We have sent it down progressively.
translations.en_yusufali: (It is) a Qur'an which We have divided (into parts from time to time), in order that thou mightest recite it to men at intervals: We have revealed it by stages.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Al-Quran itu Kami bahagi-bahagikan supaya engkau membacakannya kepada manusia dengan lambat tenang; dan Kami menurunkannya beransur-ansur.

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ ءَامِنُوا۟ بِهِۦٓ أَوْ لَا تُؤْمِنُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ مِن قَبْلِهِۦٓ إِذَا يُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ يَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ سُجَّدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul aminoo bihi aw la tuminoo inna allatheena ootoo alAAilma min qablihi itha yutla AAalayhim yakhirroona lilathqani sujjadan

translations.en_sahih: Say, "Believe in it or do not believe. Indeed, those who were given knowledge before it - when it is recited to them, they fall upon their faces in prostration,
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Whether ye believe in it or not, it is true that those who were given knowledge beforehand, when it is recited to them, fall down on their faces in humble prostration,
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad kepada orang-orang yang ingkar itu): "Sama ada kamu beriman kepada Al-Quran atau kamu tiada beriman, (tidaklah menjadi hal); kerana sesungguhnya orang-orang yang diberi ilmu sebelum itu apabila dibacakan Al-Quran kepada mereka, mereka segera tunduk sujud (dalam keadaan hiba dan khusyuk);

ayahs.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِن كَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّنَا لَمَفْعُولًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayaqooloona subhana rabbina in kana waAAdu rabbina lamafAAoolan

translations.en_sahih: And they say, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, the promise of our Lord has been fulfilled."
translations.en_yusufali: "And they say: 'Glory to our Lord! Truly has the promise of our Lord been fulfilled!'"
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta mereka menegaskan (dalam sujudnya): "Maha Suci Tuhan kami! Sesungguhnya janji Tuhan kami tetap terlaksana. "

ayahs.arabic: وَيَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقَانِ يَبْكُونَ وَيَزِيدُهُمْ خُشُوعًا ۩
ayahs.transliteration: Wayakhirroona lilathqani yabkoona wayazeeduhum khushooAAan

translations.en_sahih: And they fall upon their faces weeping, and the Qur'an increases them in humble submission.
translations.en_yusufali: They fall down on their faces in tears, and it increases their (earnest) humility.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka segera tunduk sujud itu sambil menangis, sedang Al-Quran menambahkan mereka khusyuk.

ayahs.arabic: قُلِ ٱدْعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ أَوِ ٱدْعُوا۟ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ ۖ أَيًّا مَّا تَدْعُوا۟ فَلَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ وَلَا تَجْهَرْ بِصَلَاتِكَ وَلَا تُخَافِتْ بِهَا وَٱبْتَغِ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ سَبِيلًا
ayahs.transliteration: Quli odAAoo Allaha awi odAAoo alrrahmana ayyan ma tadAAoo falahu alasmao alhusna wala tajhar bisalatika wala tukhafit biha waibtaghi bayna thalika sabeelan

translations.en_sahih: Say, "Call upon Allah or call upon the Most Merciful. Whichever [name] you call - to Him belong the best names." And do not recite [too] loudly in your prayer or [too] quietly but seek between that an [intermediate] way.
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Call upon Allah, or call upon Rahman: by whatever name ye call upon Him, (it is well): for to Him belong the Most Beautiful Names. Neither speak thy Prayer aloud, nor speak it in a low tone, but seek a middle course between."
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Serulah nama " Allah" atau nama "Ar-Rahman", yang mana sahaja kamu serukan (dari kedua-dua nama itu adalah baik belaka); kerana Allah mempunyai banyak nama-nama yang baik serta mulia". Dan janganlah engkau nyaringkan bacaan doa atau sembahyangmu, juga janganlah engkau perlahankannya, dan gunakanlah sahaja satu cara yang sederhana antara itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَدًا وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ شَرِيكٌ فِى ٱلْمُلْكِ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ وَلِىٌّ مِّنَ ٱلذُّلِّ ۖ وَكَبِّرْهُ تَكْبِيرًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Waquli alhamdu lillahi allathee lam yattakhith waladan walam yakun lahu shareekun fee almulki walam yakun lahu waliyyun mina alththulli wakabbirhu takbeeran

translations.en_sahih: And say, "Praise to Allah, who has not taken a son and has had no partner in [His] dominion and has no [need of a] protector out of weakness; and glorify Him with [great] glorification."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "Praise be to Allah, who begets no son, and has no partner in (His) dominion: Nor (needs) He any to protect Him from humiliation: yea, magnify Him for His greatness and glory!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan katakanlah: "Segala puji tertentu bagi Allah yang tiada mempunyai anak, dan tiada bagiNya sekutu dalam urusan kerajaanNya, dan tiada bagiNya penolong disebabkan sesuatu kelemahanNya; dan hendaklah engkau membesarkan serta memuliakanNya dengan bersungguh-sungguh!"
